task_completion.description: Crawl the target website using Screaming Frog SEO Spider
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider interface is visible with 'https://crawler-test.com/' in the URL bar and crawl results populating the main window.

task_completion.description: Export URI data to the specified CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal showing 'uri_analysis.csv' being saved or existing in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create the remediation report text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager showing 'url_hygiene_report.txt' located in the '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Include required URL counts in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report explicitly lists the total URL count, the count of URLs exceeding 115 characters, and the count of URLs containing uppercase characters or underscores.

task_completion.description: Include a list of the 10 longest URLs in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report contains a list of exactly 10 long URLs from the crawled website.

task_completion.description: Include specific remediation recommendations in the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text report contains a section with actionable advice or recommendations for fixing the identified URL hygiene issues (e.g., rewriting, redirecting).

integrity.description: Agent used Screaming Frog SEO Spider to perform the audit
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog GUI is visible in the screenshots and shows actual interaction with the target URL, rather than the agent bypassing the tool.

integrity.description: The report contains genuine URLs from the target website
integrity.visual_evidence: The 10 longest URLs listed in the report actually belong to the 'crawler-test.com' domain and are not placeholder or hallucinated text.

integrity.description: The report was genuinely created by the agent
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing, pasting, or using a script to generate the contents of 'url_hygiene_report.txt' in a text editor or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is https://crawler-test.com/. Expected CSV path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/uri_analysis.csv (should contain at least 20 rows). Expected report path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/url_hygiene_report.txt (should be at least 400 characters). The report must contain at least 3 numeric counts and at least 3 of the following keywords: length, uppercase, underscore, character, recommend, rewrite, redirect.
